title: Start The Operator Station And Home The Tipper Axes
summary: Start the operator station by verifying AGV and power prerequisites, clearing a flashing ESTOP if present, homing axes Z1, A1, Z2, and A2 with AUTO REF, pressing CYCLE START so the motor moves from home to ready, and placing the tipper in AUTO mode to wait for WCS instructions.
when_to_use: Use when starting the operator station and preparing the tipper axes for operation as documented in the OptiSweep Operation and Maintenance Manual.
not_for: Do not use this runbook as the AGV startup procedure; the source states AGV startup details are in a separate AGV manual.
Do not use this runbook for troubleshooting axis homing failures, uncleared faults, or failure to move to ready; the source does not provide those recovery steps here.

responsibilities: Verify startup prerequisites at the operator station.
Clear a flashing ESTOP condition if present using the documented reset action.
Start the cycle and place the tipper in AUTO mode.
Verify the tipper is waiting for WCS instructions.

safety_notes: If the ESTOP is flashing, pull out the ESTOP and press RESET on the HMI screen to clear any faults.
The source does not provide additional safety controls, LOTO requirements, or production stop requirements for this procedure.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the operator station control panel
Access to the operator station HMI
Ability to observe axis button color changes and tipper motion

access_required: Access to the operator station control panel
Access to the operator station HMI
external_references: Separate AGV manual for AGV startup instructions.

steps.title: Verify AGVs are powered on
steps.purpose: Confirm the documented AGV prerequisite before starting the operator station.
steps.instruction: Verify the AGVs are powered on.
steps.healthy_condition: AGVs are powered on as required before operator station startup.
steps.failure_condition: AGVs are not powered on or their startup state cannot be confirmed.

actions.exact_action: Verify the AGVs are powered on.

Verify the AGVs are powered on and verify the main disconnect is ON before starting the operator station.

steps.title: Verify main disconnect is ON
steps.purpose: Confirm the documented power prerequisite before starting the operator station.
steps.instruction: Verify the main disconnect is ON.
steps.healthy_condition: Main disconnect is in the ON state.
steps.failure_condition: Main disconnect is not ON or its state cannot be confirmed.

actions.label: Check main disconnect
actions.exact_action: Verify the main disconnect is ON.

stop_or_escalate_if: Main disconnect state cannot be verified.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Verify the main disconnect is ON.
Verify the AGVs are powered on and verify the main disconnect is ON before starting the operator station.

steps.title: Clear flashing ESTOP if present
steps.purpose: Clear documented faults associated with a flashing ESTOP condition before homing axes.
steps.instruction: At the operator station control panel, check whether the ESTOP is flashing. If it is flashing, pull out the ESTOP and press RESET on the HMI screen to clear any faults.
steps.expected_result: Any flashing ESTOP condition is cleared using the documented reset action.
steps.healthy_condition: ESTOP is not flashing, or if it was flashing it has been pulled out and RESET has been pressed to clear faults.
steps.failure_condition: ESTOP remains flashing or faults do not clear after the documented action.

actions.label: Check ESTOP indication
actions.exact_action: At the operator station control panel, check whether the ESTOP is flashing.

actions.label: Pull out ESTOP
actions.exact_action: If it is flashing, pull out the ESTOP.

actions.label: Press RESET
actions.exact_action: Press RESET on the HMI screen to clear any faults.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: RESET control on the operator station HMI.
Axis controls and RESET instruction on the operator station HMI.
Emergency stop push-button on the operator station.
Startup procedure context on page 82 including ESTOP reset and HMI actions.

stop_or_escalate_if: ESTOP remains flashing after pulling it out and pressing RESET.
Faults do not clear after pressing RESET.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If the ESTOP is flashing, pull out the ESTOP and press RESET on the HMI screen to clear any faults.
At the operator station control panel, if the ESTOP is flashing, pull out the ESTOP and press RESET on the HMI screen to clear any faults.

steps.title: Home axes Z1, A1, Z2, and A2
steps.purpose: Reference the documented left and right tipper axes before starting the cycle.
steps.instruction: Home every axis: Z1 and A1 for the left tipper, and Z2 and A2 for the right tipper.
steps.expected_result: All documented axes are selected for homing.
steps.healthy_condition: Z1, A1, Z2, and A2 are the axes being homed as documented.
steps.failure_condition: One or more documented axes are not included in the homing action.

actions.label: Home all documented axes
actions.exact_action: Home every axis: Z1 and A1 for the left tipper, and Z2 and A2 for the right tipper.

Axis labels Z1, Z2, A1, and A2 on the operator station HMI.
Axis controls for left and right tipper on the operator station screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The required axes Z1, A1, Z2, and A2 cannot be identified on the HMI.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Home every axis: Z1 and A1 (left tipper) and Z2 and A2 (right tipper).

steps.title: Press AUTO REF
steps.purpose: Initiate the documented automatic axis referencing action.
steps.expected_result: Automatic referencing is initiated for the documented axes.
steps.healthy_condition: AUTO REF is pressed and the homing sequence begins.
steps.failure_condition: AUTO REF cannot be pressed or the homing sequence does not begin.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: AUTO REF control on the operator station HMI.
Startup procedure context including AUTO REF.
Axis-related HMI controls that help orient the operator to the referencing screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: AUTO REF is unavailable on the HMI.
Pressing AUTO REF does not initiate axis movement.

steps.title: Observe axis button color change during movement
steps.purpose: Verify the documented visual indication that an axis is moving during referencing.
steps.instruction: Observe that the axis button changes from green to yellow to indicate it is moving.
steps.expected_result: The axis button changes from green to yellow while the axis is moving.
steps.healthy_condition: Axis button changes from green to yellow as described.
steps.failure_condition: Axis button does not change from green to yellow as described.

actions.label: Watch axis status color
actions.exact_action: Observe that the axis button changes from green to yellow to indicate it is moving.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: System screen artifact associated with startup and operator station procedures.
Axis referencing HMI context where status indications may be observed.
Axis buttons and controls on the operator station HMI.

stop_or_escalate_if: Axis button does not change from green to yellow.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The axis button changes from green to yellow to indicate it is moving.

steps.title: Observe tipper motor stop at home proximity switch
steps.purpose: Verify the documented physical homing behavior of the tipper motor.
steps.instruction: Observe that the tipper motor moves until it senses the home proximity switch, then stops.
steps.expected_result: The tipper motor moves to the home position and stops when the home proximity switch is sensed.
steps.healthy_condition: Motor movement stops after sensing the home proximity switch.
steps.failure_condition: Motor does not move, does not stop, or does not appear to stop at the home proximity switch.

actions.label: Watch motor home movement
actions.exact_action: Observe that the tipper motor moves until it senses the home proximity switch, then stops.

stop_or_escalate_if: Tipper motor does not move during homing.
Tipper motor does not stop after reaching the home proximity switch.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The tipper motor moves until it senses the home proximity switch, then stops.

steps.title: Press CYCLE START
steps.purpose: Start the documented transition from home to ready after homing is complete.
steps.expected_result: The cycle start command is issued.
steps.failure_condition: CYCLE START cannot be pressed or does not initiate the next movement.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: CYCLE START control on the operator station HMI.
Startup procedure context including CYCLE START.

stop_or_escalate_if: Pressing CYCLE START does not initiate movement from home to ready.

steps.title: Observe motor move from home to ready
steps.purpose: Verify the documented post-start movement into the ready state.
steps.instruction: Observe that the motor moves from home to ready.
steps.expected_result: The motor moves from home to ready.
steps.healthy_condition: Motor reaches the ready state after CYCLE START.
steps.failure_condition: Motor does not move from home to ready.

actions.label: Watch move to ready
actions.exact_action: Observe that the motor moves from home to ready.

stop_or_escalate_if: Motor does not move from home to ready.

Press CYCLE START. The motor moves from home to ready. Place the tipper in AUTO mode. The tipper will wait for the WCS to send instructions.

steps.expected_result: Tipper is placed in AUTO mode.
steps.failure_condition: Tipper is not in AUTO mode.

actions.exact_action: Place the tipper in AUTO mode.

steps.purpose: Confirm the documented final ready state after startup is complete.
steps.instruction: Verify the tipper waits for the WCS to send instructions.
steps.expected_result: Tipper is in AUTO mode and waiting for WCS instructions.
steps.healthy_condition: Tipper waits for the WCS to send instructions.
steps.failure_condition: Tipper does not wait for WCS instructions after being placed in AUTO mode.

actions.exact_action: Verify the tipper waits for the WCS to send instructions.

Press CYCLE START. The motor moves from home to ready. Place the tipper in AUTO mode. The tipper will wait for the WCS to send instructions.

success_criteria: Any flashing ESTOP condition is cleared using the documented reset action.
Axes Z1, A1, Z2, and A2 are homed.
Axis button changes from green to yellow during movement.
Tipper motor moves until it senses the home proximity switch and then stops.
After CYCLE START, the motor moves from home to ready.
Tipper is placed in AUTO mode.
healthy_conditions: ESTOP is not flashing, or faults are cleared after pulling out the ESTOP and pressing RESET.
Axis movement indication changes from green to yellow during AUTO REF.
Tipper motor stops at the home proximity switch.
Motor reaches ready after CYCLE START.
Tipper remains in AUTO mode waiting for WCS instructions.
failure_conditions: ESTOP remains flashing or faults do not clear after RESET.
An axis does not home as expected.
Axis button does not change from green to yellow as described.
Tipper motor does not stop at the home proximity switch.
Motor does not move from home to ready after CYCLE START.
Tipper does not enter AUTO mode.
Tipper does not wait for WCS instructions.
escalation_guidance: Use the separate AGV manual for AGV startup instructions; this source does not include those steps here.
If an axis does not home, the button color does not change as described, faults do not clear, or the motor does not move to ready, the source does not provide escalation guidance in this procedure.
Escalate for SME review when the documented startup sequence cannot be completed using the source-backed steps above.

AGV system startup context relevant to the AGV powered-on prerequisite.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Verify the AGVs are powered on. Verify the main disconnect is ON. If the ESTOP is flashing, pull out the ESTOP and press RESET on the HMI screen to clear any faults.

Home every axis: Z1 and A1 (left tipper) and Z2 and A2 (right tipper): Press AUTO REF. The axis button changes from green to yellow to indicate it is moving. The tipper motor moves until it senses the home proximity switch, then stops.
Press CYCLE START. The motor moves from home to ready. Place the tipper in AUTO mode. The tipper will wait for the WCS to send instructions.

missing_details: The source references a separate AGV manual for AGV startup instructions and does not include those steps here.
The source does not provide escalation guidance if an axis does not home, the button color does not change as described, faults do not clear, or the motor does not move to ready.
The source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source does not specify supporting roles beyond the operator.
The source does not specify whether production stop or LOTO is required for this procedure.
